TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Reptilian Kingdoms Faction.

Translations.Comment: Saurios = saurian/lizard. Reinos = kingdoms. Ancient lizard-men empires.
Core lizard-men warriors. Guerreros = warriors, Saurios = saurian.
Heavy reptilian warriors. Golpeadores = bruisers/strikers, Crocólidos = crocodile-like creatures.
Lesser lizard troops. Bravos = braves/warriors, Tritones = newts. Uses classical Spanish naming.
Fast cavalry riding velociraptors. Lightning strikes. Montadores = riders.
Flying cavalry on pterodactyls. Air superiority. Jinetes = riders.
Fire-breathing lizard monster. Ígneo = fiery/igneous. Suggests mythical heat and power.
Kept as dinosaur name. Massive horned beast. Scientific name translates equally to Spanish.
Swarm of small reptilian creatures from the jungle. Enjambre = swarm. Fantasy wargame terminology.
Terrifying predator. Fauces = fanged jaws/maw, Terror = dread. Evokes mythical menace.
King of the lizards. Tiranosaurio = Spanish form of tyrannosaur. Scientific name widely recognized.
Religious leader of the lesser reptilians. Sacerdote = priest. Formal, serious tone for wargame.
Powerful military commander. Señor de la Guerra = warlord (literal: lord of war). Conveys authority and military might.
Mystical amphibian sage. Ancestral = ancient/primal. Emphasizes mystical and primordial nature.
